# Copilot Instructions for FastAPI Application

This is a simple FastAPI application with Swagger documentation.

## Project Setup
- Project Type: Python FastAPI Application
- Framework: FastAPI
- Documentation: Swagger/OpenAPI (auto-generated)

## Development Environment
- Python 3.8+
- Required packages: fastapi, uvicorn

## Running the Application
Use the provided run task or:
```bash
python -m uvicorn main:app --reload
```

Access Swagger UI at: http://localhost:8000/docs
Access ReDoc at: http://localhost:8000/redoc
